title: Data-source submission manifest
description: A DECLARATIVE description of an electricity-tariff data source someone wants added. Submitters describe the endpoint + licence; they do NOT submit code that the trusted build runs. CI validates this, then a maintainer reviews. The licence decides routing: permissive -> core repo; share-alike -> open-energy-tariffs-extended.

sourceUrl.description: The data endpoint (API/CSV/JSON/SPARQL). Must be HTTPS.

docsUrl.description: Optional: page describing the dataset / its terms.

licence.description: Declared licence. Must be on the allow-list (see scripts/validate-submission.mjs). Permissive -> core; share-alike (CC-BY-SA / ODbL) -> extended repo; anything non-commercial / all-rights-reserved / unknown is rejected.

attribution.description: Exact attribution string the licence requires, e.g. 'Superintendencia de Servicios Públicos Domiciliarios'.

fieldMap.description: Optional declarative mapping of source fields to canonical (rate, supply, etc.). Sources that need real transformation get a code-reviewed importer PR instead.

sample.description: Optional: a sample record from the endpoint, to help review.

notes.description: Anything a reviewer should know (coverage, caveats, refresh cadence).
